Paillette v2 omni visual review

Offline v2 corpus-filtered results. Top 8 shown per query. Review whether omni image improves visual relevance enough to replace Jina CLIP v2 image.
decided_jina_text_routedDecided: Jina CLIP v2 image + Jina text caption + metadatametadata @10 100% | medium @10 100% | text overlap 49.9%
omni_family_routedOmni family: v5 omni image + Jina text caption + metadatametadata @10 100% | medium @10 100% | text overlap 49.6%
omni_image_metadataOmni image + metadatametadata @10 100% | medium @10 100% | text overlap 43.5%
omni_image_onlyOmni image onlymetadata @10 57% | medium @10 86% | text overlap 31.0%

Read rows horizontally. The decided row uses Jina CLIP v2 for images; omni rows use jina-embeddings-v5-omni-small for images. Captions use Jina v5 text-small where present.
